hero.title:
THE STANDARD OF
IMAGE EXTRACTION
hero.desc:
Leave image exploration and organization to REVISION.
Save your valuable time for true creativity.
Preview instantly, filter perfectly, and download only what you need.

features.title: ADVANCING THE STANDARD
features.subtitle: What others call premium, we call the baseline.
features.f1_desc: Custom folders and auto-numbering keep your workspace absolutely spotless.
features.f2_desc: Batch convert mixed elements like WebP or AVIF straight into high-quality JPG or PNG.
features.f3_desc: Preview high-res assets in real-time. Never download gigabytes of junk you don't need.
features.f4_desc: Grab individual shots or securely pack hundreds of selected images into a tidy ZIP file.
features.f5_desc: Seamlessly scan and command images across all your active tabs in one unified window.
features.f6_desc: Operates gently. Safe, optimized crawling that respects host traffic and your local CPU.
features.f7_desc: Create your perfect workspace with freely customizable color palettes and seamless dark mode.
features.f8_title: Built for Creators, by a Creator
features.f8_desc: Born from a veteran designer's frustration. Actively used and constantly refined from real-world usage.

showcase.title: PRECISION INTERFACE
showcase.subtitle: Experience the beauty of high-performance utility.

help.step1_desc: Navigate to any website and click the icon. Our engine starts instantly.
help.step2_desc: Use range sliders to find assets. Select all or pick individual shots.
help.step3_desc: Set your naming pattern and hit Download. It's that simple.
help.q1: Why can't I see the download popup?
help.a1: Chrome may block multiple download requests. Check settings at chrome://settings/downloads and disable "Ask where to save each file".
help.q2: Does it work on Instagram or Pinterest?
help.a2: Yes. REVISION features a special social media driver that handles complex URL patterns found on these platforms.
help.q3: Can I convert images to JPG or PNG?
help.a3: Absolutely. You can choose to save files in their original format or convert them within the download settings.

testimonials.title: What Creators are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Designed for professionals, loved by creators worldwide.
testimonials.t1_quote: This is exactly what I've been waiting for.
testimonials.t1_desc: The built-in high-res viewer is an absolute game-changer. It completely eliminates the need to download megabytes of junk files just to check the quality. My workflow has never been this fast.
testimonials.t2_desc: The ability to set custom folders and auto-number patterns right from the extension saves me hours of manual renaming every week. My downloads folder has never looked this clean.
testimonials.t3_desc: Grabbing hundreds of obscure WebP and AVIF files and batch-converting them into high-quality PNGs with a single click is pure magic. It handles heavy lifting effortlessly.
testimonials.t4_quote: Built by someone who truly understands.
testimonials.t4_desc: No bloated ads, no aggressive scripts causing lag. Just fluid, precise control across multiple tabs. You can immediately feel this was designed by a professional who actually uses it.

manifesto.title: THE HIGH-STANDARD MANIFESTO
manifesto.lead:
The Standard is no longer a compromise.
It is the new pinnacle.
manifesto.desc:
This project began as a personal mission to liberate creativity.
I believe that high-standard tools should be an essential right,
empowering individuals to shape the future without barriers.
manifesto.signature: “One mind, dedicated to saving your time.”

trust.title_vision:
A Professional Standard,
Built for Endless Evolution.
trust.desc_vision: REVISION was born in the studio out of a veteran designer-developer's frustration with mediocre image hunting. It is the definitive answer to a professional’s daily struggle for a better workflow. This isn’t dead software abandoned after launch—it is deeply integrated into its creator's daily workflow, guaranteeing it continuously evolves and improves for every visual thinker on the planet.
trust.v_point1_desc: Solving actual creative bottlenecks, not imagined ones.
trust.v_point2_desc: Constantly refined because the creator relies on it daily.
trust.v_point3_desc: A pure, purposeful bridge connecting deep research with brilliant creation.
trust.accent:
Built by a Professional.
Refined by Daily Reality.
trust.title_privacy:
Security is Not a Feature;
It’s Our Infrastructure.
trust.desc_privacy: Your data is your intellect. REVISION operates with a zero-knowledge philosophy, where your creative process remains strictly yours.
trust.p_point1_desc: All scanning and processing take place directly on your device.
trust.p_point2_desc: No browsing history or personal data is collected or transmitted.
trust.p_point3_desc: Our entire engine is built around your anonymity.
trust.p_point4_desc: We only request what is essential for image extraction.
trust.copyright_responsibility: User is responsible for respecting the copyright of downloaded images.

footer.brand_line: REVISION — Elevating your web media experience.
